question_template:
There are a total of {num_courses} courses you have to take, labeled from 0 to {last_index}.

You are given the following list of prerequisites, where the i-th element in the list (a_i, b_i) indicates that you must first take course b_i if you want to take course a_i:
{prerequisites}

Return {true_answer} if you can finish all courses considering the prerequisites, or {false_answer} otherwise.
